name: ProjectsPermissionsApi
summary: Bluebeam Studio API — Projects / Permissions endpoints. Auto-generated REST surface; one method per HTTP operation.

methods.name: ListFolderPermissions
methods.summary: Get project folder permission.              Will return empty string if permission is not set
methods.remarks: HTTP GET `/publicapi/v1/projects/{projectId}/folders/{folderId}/permissions`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: UpdateFolderPermissions
methods.signature: Task UpdateFolderPermissions(Guid projectId, int folderId, UpdateFolderPermissionsRequest request)
methods.summary: Update project folder permissions.              Permission types: Hidden, Read, ReadWrite, ReadWriteDelete.              Set Permission to null to inherit permission from parent folder
methods.remarks: HTTP PUT `/publicapi/v1/projects/{projectId}/folders/{folderId}/permissions`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

params.name: request
params.doc: Request body. JSON object with fields: Permission, UserId.

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: ListProjectPermissions
methods.remarks: HTTP GET `/publicapi/v1/projects/{projectId}/permissions`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: UpdateProjectPermissions
methods.summary: Update project permissions.              Set value to allow, deny, or default
methods.remarks: HTTP PUT `/publicapi/v1/projects/{projectId}/permissions`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

params.name: request
params.doc: Request body. JSON object with fields: Allow, Type.

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.
